narrative:
Crosby Twp. township has 5,374 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.4 percentage points.
